name: ClickDimensions
description:
ClickDimensions has a narrow use-case, but it’s top of class for those looking for a tool like this. The platform is known for its integration with Microsoft Dynamics 365, providing tools for email marketing, event management, and social media management. Obviously, it’s favored by businesses using Dynamics 365, since it seamlessly combines CRM and marketing functions on one platform.

Here’s why you’ll like it:

  • ClickDimensions offers custom pricing based on your particular Dynamics 365 environment
  • The CRM integration is unmatched
  • Make multi-channel marketing a breeze. Manage email, social media, and events in one platform!
  • The analytics are top notch. You can easily track and analyze customer interactions and campaign performance.
  • The platform supports Facebook, Instagram, X, and LinkedIn, and integrates with Dynamics 365

Key Features:

✅ CRM-integrated marketing

✅ Multi-channel campaign management

✅ Comprehensive scheduling

✅ Detailed analytics
what_people_say:
What people say :

Calling all Dynamics 365 users! Customers value ClickDimensions for its comprehensive approach to customer engagement across platforms, and love its analytics, to boot. The campaign management is top tier, empowering users to execute strategic attacks on all fronts.

Here’s what customers think of the product:

“ClickDimensions is ideal for our Dynamics 365 ecosystem. Having everything in one place prevents silos and means one less budget line item.”

“It’s a comprehensive tool, though more specialized features for social media would be welcome. I’m not sure if we’ll stay or find something else. I wish there was more help with content creation. Besides the analytics, it’s bare bones”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Simplified user experience.
  • 🚫 Social inbox
  • 🚫 Content creation assistance
  • 🚫 Broader integration with non-Dynamics platforms
